info.name: Xfusion Exam Evaluation API
info.description: Postman Collection for testing the Xfusion Automated Exam Evaluation API. Designed to connect with WordPress data sources.

request.description: Checks backend status, database directories, and validates if the OpenAI API Key is loaded correctly.

item.name: Knowledge Base

request.description: Indexes or updates a WordPress document inside the ChromaDB vector database. Performs automatic deduplication.
Deletes all indexed vector chunks belonging to the specified WordPress post ID.
Retrieves and lists all currently indexed knowledge base chunks and their metadata inside ChromaDB.

item.description: Endpoints to manage company reference policies, SOPs, and guidelines.

item.name: Evaluation

request.description: Submits employee exam answers. Retrieves contextual guidance from ChromaDB, compiles prompts, and runs gpt-4o-mini to produce a structured scorecard report in English.

item.description: Endpoints to submit employee tests for instant grading.
